dc:title: International Journal of Oral Science - Complete Open-Access Corpus (2009-2026)
dc:creator: Lakens, Daniel
dc:subject: dentistry
oral science
open access
natural language processing
AI validation
text mining
dc:description: A complete corpus of 724 open-access articles published in International Journal of Oral Science (2009-2026), converted to metacheck paperlist objects for validation of AI and text-mining tools. DOIs were verified against the original CrossRef sample rather than relying solely on GROBID's header extraction, which was unreliable for a number of articles.
dc:source: International Journal of Oral Science, ISSN 2049-3169, https://www.nature.com/ijos/
dc:rights: Mostly CC-BY 4.0; some articles CC-BY-NC-ND 3.0/4.0, check individual article (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/, https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/)

dc:provenance.pdf_source: Unpaywall API, with resolved doi.org redirect fallback for articles not yet re-crawled
dc:provenance.doi_matching: Verified against original CrossRef sample DOI (2026-06-19)
dc:provenance.sampling: Complete corpus (all available open-access articles, not a sample)
